case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS PONCE, MARIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MARIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PONCE, MARIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: DECEASED.
